name: Dialogue Summarization with Emotion Dynamics Using Topic- and Participant-Centric Decomposition

description: arXiv:2607.14769v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Existing text summarization research has focused much on monologic information (e.g., newspaper articles, reports) without accounting for the interaction between speakers or authors. In contrast, dialogues are a rich communication channel where multiple participants conduct back and forth exchanges to construct meaning. We propose a dialogue sum...
author: Linyun Xiang, Mark Neerincx, Stephanie Tan
